case_title: MARTINEZ, JOEL vs. MARSHALL, BRENDA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARSHALL, BRENDA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 516 ELLIS #408, STAYED UNTIL FEB-27-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, 11:59 PM. IF DEFT FAILS TO VACATE ON TIME, PLTF MAY AMEND JDMT FOR BACK RENT & DAMAGES, COSTS.
